courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Local Cooperative Game
genericDescription: Design shared goals; create interdependence; prevent one player from doing all meaningful work.
specificDescription: Build a local cooperative game for two players where each player has a distinct responsibility. Include fail states caused by coordination breakdown, not only individual skill.
gradingRubric: 30 pts cooperation design; 20 pts role balance; 20 pts shared feedback; 15 pts accessibility of inputs; 15 pts documentation.
